behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all file paths (pkg/compose/publish.go, pkg/e2e/compose_run_build_once_test.go, CLAUDE.md), the strings 'make build', 'go test', 'golangci-lint', '.golangci.yml', 'fmt.Fprintf', '//nolint:errcheck', and specifies 3 occurrences.
